text.title: dev-methodologies-architecture Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for dev-methodologies-architecture as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent "fixing" a stale cache read by lowering TTL instead of adding a write-through invalidation on the write path.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Lower TTL increases cache miss rate and database load; the root cause is a missing write-path invalidation. Fix the write path, not the TTL.
